highlights.summary:
The TG ICET 2026 registration deadline has been extended for admission to the MBA and MCA courses. Students can now register till Mar 23, 2026, (without a late fee) for the exam scheduled for May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Below are a few more updates related to the Trinity College of Engineering and Technology, Karimnagar:

faqs.question: How can I get into Trinity College of Engineering and Technology, Karimnagar for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Trinity College of Engineering and Technology, Karimnagar has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh. Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.
MBA/PGDM Candidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of reserved categories) in the qualifying examinations. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis. The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH, 2003). No maximum age limit.
After 10th Diploma Candidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination. Candidate must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in March/April-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared are also eligible.

faqs.question: How is the faculty at Trinity College of Engineering and Technology, Karimnagar?
faqs.answer: Trinity College of Engineering and Technology, Karimnagar has been rated 4.2 for faculty as per reviews by students. This shows that Institute has qualified and experienced faculty members.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Trinity College of Engineering and Technology, Karimnagar offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM. Trinity College of Engineering and Technology, Karimnagar courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Trinity College of Engineering and Technology, Karimnagar courses stands around INR 44,700 to 2,60,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: A college with a good environment and good quality of education.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students are placed. 15-20 LPA is the average package. 20-30% of students get internships, and others are just not interested. The roles offered are artificial intelligence, machine learning, coding, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi in our college, in the labs, in classrooms, and even in the library. The main thing in our college hostel is that it provides good and nutritious meals. We prefer the canteen just for snacks and tea. We play the games twice a week. We play games like cricket and basketball.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with staff and HOD. They motivate me every time, and last year was good.

review_content.Placements: There are fewer placements in college, and most are related to non-IT backgrounds. The highest salary package offered was 3 LPA, and 20% of students got placed in 2021. Recruiting companies include Genpact and Wipro. Additionally, there is a low percentage of students who secured internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is great, with labs and a canteen in the college. However, there are no games or extracurricular activities. Hostel is only for girls. Food is delivered at lunchtime. Lab facility is excellent, allowing us to practice anytime. Library is also very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Quite dissatisfied because of infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of the students placed in my batch was 60 percent. The highest package was 6 lacs, the average package was 4.5 lacs, and the lowest package was 2 lacs. The top recruiting companies were Capgemini and Wipro. Several students got internships in those companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for my department are average. The white and chalkboards are getting old and have cracks. The facilities like projectors and computers are getting outdated. The quality of food available in the mess is acceptable.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I'm not satisfied with the placement cell at Trinity, Karimnagar.

review_content.Placements: Placements were amazing, but only a selected few students got their dream placements. Other students are left to deal with their own problems regarding placements. The placement cell is not very responsive. The highest package was 8 LPA, and the average was 5.5 LPA. Internships were provided to students in the final year only.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities on campus were best in class. The library is well-stocked, Wi-Fi is available all over the campus, modern architecture, and labs with computers for all students. Events are organized every month for the entertainment of students. The food quality in the mess and canteen is good, and sports opportunities are given to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Infrastructure and facilities are good.

review_content.Placements: Placements in the college were good, but not every student is placed; only 50% of students got their placements. The maximum package size was 8 lakhs, and the minimum was 5 LPA. Internships were available for students, but they are only provided in the final year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is brilliant, with facilities like Wi-Fi, a library, digital classrooms, and computers available for students. The canteen food quality is good and offers value for money, but the medical and sports facilities are not that good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Very satisfying campus and facilities.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in my batch is 70 percent. The top recruiting companies were Wipro and Infosys. The highest package offered was 12 lacs, the average package was 7 lacs and the lowest package offered was 4 lacs. Many students got internships in many reputed companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in my department are very good. Technologies like computers, projectors and screens are updated and modern. The classrooms and labs are well modified and comfortable. A well stocked library is also present covering a huge area.

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering and B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 87774, 89627 and 91491, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Trinity College of Engineering and Technology, Karimnagar MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 28339. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 37504, and the 2023 cutoff was 38661 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been increasing in the last 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: A college with a good environment and good quality of education.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi in our college, in the labs, in classrooms, and even in the library. The main thing in our college hostel is that it provides good and nutritious meals. We prefer the canteen just for snacks and tea. We play the games twice a week. We play games like cricket and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with staff and HOD. They motivate me every time, and last year was good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is great, with labs and a canteen in the college. However, there are no games or extracurricular activities. Hostel is only for girls. Food is delivered at lunchtime. Lab facility is excellent, allowing us to practice anytime. Library is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: Quite dissatisfied because of infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for my department are average. The white and chalkboards are getting old and have cracks. The facilities like projectors and computers are getting outdated. The quality of food available in the mess is acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: I'm not satisfied with the placement cell at Trinity, Karimnagar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities on campus were best in class. The library is well-stocked, Wi-Fi is available all over the campus, modern architecture, and labs with computers for all students. Events are organized every month for the entertainment of students. The food quality in the mess and canteen is good, and sports opportunities are given to students.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is brilliant, with facilities like Wi-Fi, a library, digital classrooms, and computers available for students. The canteen food quality is good and offers value for money, but the medical and sports facilities are not that good.

reviews.review_heading: Very satisfying campus and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my department are very good. Technologies like computers, projectors and screens are updated and modern. The classrooms and labs are well modified and comfortable. A well stocked library is also present covering a huge area.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Trinity College of Engineering and Technology, Karimnagar.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good compared to placements; all facilities are provided by the college including library, canteen, Wi-Fi, computers, labs, classrooms, sports, and hostels. The food quality is good and satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: Complete college information.
reviews.review_text:
The equipment in the labs is good and sufficient. 
Classrooms are kept clean and neat.
Instructions are given to everyone.
Each subject has a lab and extra equipment is also available with them.
Polytechnic students also have good equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Trinity College of Engineering and Technology, Karimnagar.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our department are playground, swimming pool, etc. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is neat. The food served is good. They provide water facility for 24 hours.

reviews.review_heading: The experience from our university is excellent.
reviews.review_text:
Labs, library, play ground and bus transport facilities are so excellent and the infrastructure good in our department.
The quality of facilities in our hostel was average on the quality of food available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities, sports and games were probably amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college for studying.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. Classrooms are spacious. It is in a peaceful area. It is located on the outskirts of the city, so it has a pleasant atmosphere. The campus is big. Labs have Wi-Fi facilities, so we can use them. It has a huge library with lots of books, so we can gain knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides fewer campus placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't give access to Wi-Fi but gives access to labs at any time. Classrooms are decent. The maximum capacity is 55 students per class. A library is available all the time with the special digital library.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Trinity College of Engineering and Technology, Karimnagar.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are average. Labs are not well equipped. The library is good. There is no hostel for engineering students. We should come to college by bus, which is provided by our college. Currently, they do not charge a bus fee.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the placements, and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, a library, classrooms, etc. Our classrooms are well-equipped with projectors.

reviews.review_heading: Highly satisfied because of the placements.
reviews.review_text: Physics laboratory Chemistry lab and electrical labs are almost available for every course and each department, classrooms are very hygienic condition and Wi-Fi also available, we can get lots of books from the library for every stream. The hostel food is hygienic and water is a mineral and tap water is not provided, the mess we can get like curd and chicken for Wednesday and Sunday daily curd is available, also there we can get snacks games everything we can play in our free time.

faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?
faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

A:    Marthandam College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.
faqs.question: How can I get into Marthandam College of Engineering and Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Marthandam College of Engineering and Technology offers Degree courses including 6 UG and 3 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Marthandam College of Engineering and Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, VLSI Design.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Marthandam College of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Marthandam College of Engineering and Technology is up to 414. Good thing to know is that Marthandam College of Engineering and Technology has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Marthandam College of Engineering and Technology, Kuttakuzhi, Kanyakumari .

review_content.Placements: 90% of students were placed last year in my college. The lowest package is 1.2 lacs per annum, the average package is 2 lacs per annum, and the highest package is 5 lacs per annum. Tata consultancy services, Wipro, HCL, Mahindra and so on are the top recruiters. There are lots of internship opportunities at my college and lots of students are getting internships near Trivandrum Techno Park. Software engineer is the top role offered in my college .
review_content.Infrastructure: My college facilities are awesome and surrounded by nature and the Wi-Fi facilities are good all over the campus. The lab is good with an AC facility, the classrooms have smart classes and my department has a good library and all books related to my course. The quality of the hostel is now good, with good food and rooms; the canteen facilities are good and have foods and snacks; the medical facilities are also good in my college; in our college, students are playing in national-level matches so sports are very good.

reviews_list.review_title: I never recommend students to take admission to this college.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students get placed in our course. Our seniors got placed at Wipro. The recruiting companies are Infosys and Technopark at Trivandrum. Placements provided are good for students who are in contact with the management.

reviews.review_heading: College with freedom but less studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college to compact. The college provides internet lab which can accommodate around 40 students. There are lab facilities provided for every department. The hostel rooms are neat. But the food is not too much good and also every year students get food poisoning the semister exams are not too easy.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with rules.
reviews.review_text: We have labs and libraries can cover our full syllabus. College hostel rooms are near, but food provided is not that great. They said food is Kerala style, but it is Tamil Nadu style. Some students even moved out because of food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Marthandam College of Engineering and Technology, Kuttakuzhi, Kanyakumari .
reviews.review_text: My college facilities are awesome and surrounded by nature and the Wi-Fi facilities are good all over the campus. The lab is good with an AC facility, the classrooms have smart classes and my department has a good library and all books related to my course. The quality of the hostel is now good, with good food and rooms; the canteen facilities are good and have foods and snacks; the medical facilities are also good in my college; in our college, students are playing in national-level matches so ...

reviews.review_heading: I never recommend students to take admission to this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in the hostel are limited and the food is not good. There are no proper medical facilities. Sports activities are rarely supported.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best for education.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and infrastructure are good. It has a large library, playground, and sports are available. The condition of the hostel and college are hygienic. The hostel food is good but sometimes it is not good.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure with good facilities and equipment. Facilities regarding sports are pretty competitive, and hostels have Wi-Fi available. They all are used and well maintained too. The living spaces are clean, but the canteen food is not very hygienic, so it is better to avoid it.

reviews.review_heading: MACET Review about courses, infrastructure, facilities.
reviews.review_text:
1. Good teaching staff, best classrooms with spacious seating capacity. The labs are having better facilities and all the materials necessary. The library is also a good one with proper section for different departments, having all the books needed according to the syllabus. 
2. Hostel facility is a good one and the food is just okay. Sports and games are not given much priority.

reviews.review_heading: Good. Our collis good for all well studying students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure is excellent. Hostel good. Hostel food is extraordinary. Menu is different one by one. But the only problem in girls hostel is phone allowed only at evening 4 to night 8 clock. And sunday Saturday also morning 9 to night 8 clock

Canteen of our college is good and provides good food to students. The college has also provides hostel facilities to the students who come from out of the town. Overall, our college is the best college in the town.

reviews.review_heading: There is a good library facility and well qualified teaching faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good, which attracts everyone. The development of the college is also very good. There is a good library. The digital library is also available. We have a good campus. Good sports facilities are provided for both men and women.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. The teachers are helpful and qualified.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is not available on the college campus. The library is big and good. Every type of book is available for every branch, and the library provides free books for every student in every semester of every branch. There is a sports event every year, where every branch competes with each other.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to study. It has the good teaching staff to teach.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are big enough for everyone, and there is a mineral water facility for all the students. Wi-Fi facility is not available. The library is present for the students to study and a digital library is also there. The college library provides free books to every student every semester. The events are held in our college. The library which is big enough for the students of all branches. Enough arrangements are done to enjoy.

reviews.review_text: All the facilities are good in our college they provide free Wi-Fi for students and teachers and in hostel. In our library all types of books are there. All the labs are there which we are required. Our hostel is average and all types of sports are there.

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 290 students were admitted at A.K.T. Memorial College of Engineering and Technology and 158 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 158 students 80 were placed with median salary of INR 281000 and 2 students opted for higher studies. A total of 129 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at A.K.T. Memorial College of Engineering and Technologyand 95 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 95 students 47 were placed with median salary of INR 216000 and 2 students opted for higher studies.

faqs.question: Q: Which courses does A.K.T. Memorial College of Engineering and Technology offer to students?

faqs.answer: A.K.T. Memorial College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engg./Electrical and Electronics Engg./Electronics Engg. Candidate belonging to reserved category must have 45% in qualifying examination. Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. degrees obtained through Distance/Weekend mode are not eligible. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.

faqs.question: How can I get into ANU College of Engineering and Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
ANU College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have passed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained with the above mentioned marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.

reviews_list.review_title: Our campus life is very good.

review_content.Placements: Students who score 7.5 CGPA are eligible for recruitment. You should get at least 6.75 CGPA for decent jobs. I would recommend students to maintain 8 CGPA for good placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available 24X7. The food served in the hostel is better. There is a new hospital on our campus. Sports are conducted like football, basketball, and cricket. Playground is also available in this college.
review_content.Faculty: All teachers are Ph.D. scholars. They also provide notes and reference videos and books on the website. Semester exams are moderate. No questions are repeated from the previous year's papers, and they follow grading system.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: A stressful college with good placements.

review_content.Placements: More than 90% of the eligible candidates received offers from various leading MNCs. Companies that have come for placement include Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, Abode, Intuit, Palo Alto, Akamai, Cred, Walmart, Atlassian, Grow, Cisco, and many more. Apple India offered the highest package of INR 80+LPA CTC for the batch graduating in 2023.
review_content.Infrastructure: Faculty members are average, with most of them being underqualified and having no passion for the subject. Wi-Fi is not provided in classes, and labs are average. The library is well equipped with books covering all the subjects in great detail. The hostels are average, and the mess food is below average.

review_summary.college_name: SNGIST - Sree Narayana Guru Institute of Science and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I love the mentors. They were very friendly.

content.Placements: There was a separate placement cell for onboarding companies to the campus. Students were eligible to sit for placements during the final semester of the course. The average package was around 3-4 LPA. Approximately 50-60% of students got placed on the campus.
content.Infrastructure: The women's and men’s hostels were good. They provided better options for students and were among the best hostels I had seen. We had to pay a monthly fee for the hostel and mess. If we had holidays, the amount was reduced. There were meetings regarding food, and we could give suggestions. Every room was attached to a bathroom, and four students stayed in one room. The rooms were cleaned every day. Each student had a study table and a wardrobe to keep their things. At night, security guards were there, and a warden was also available.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college infrastructure is very good.

content.Placements: About 70% of students in the college are placed in top companies. The lowest salary is Rs. 12,500 per month. Top recruiting companies like Tata, Bharat, Mercedes-Benz, etc., visit the college to hire students. Almost 99% of students got internships. A top role offered is a mechanical engineer.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities for engineering students are available in our college. Engineering mechanical workshops and electrical labs are very interesting and good for students. The hostel facilities for students are very good. Best food facilities, canteen, good rooms with bed and washing machines are available there.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: SNGIST For MCA course admission in 2025 provides much information.

content.Placements: There are placements on campus. The best industrial companies visit the college. Companies provide a salary package of 4 LPA to 12 LPA to average students. There is one condition for participating in placements on campus. Students must score 7 CGPA marks on the total semester exam.
content.Infrastructure: This college has the best infrastructure and facilities. Multiple facilities are provided like classrooms, labs, fast Wi-Fi, bathrooms, a library, a hostel, etc. There is a college canteen. The food is very tasty and clean. It is very costly.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Management was excellent because they treated us us their own kids.

content.Placements: From the 5th semester, students were eligible for campus placement. TCS, Infosys, and other startup companies visit campus. Good packages were offered. If the skill set was good, they offer good package. Above 65% percentage was required for all companies. My plan was to get job as soon as possible.
content.Infrastructure: College life was excellent because many activities and programs were held in our college during our batch. I was one of the members of our college union in my final year, so I could be a part of all these activities. Hostel facilities were extremely good. There were Wi-Fi facilities and all other amenities. Hostel was situated within the campus. The process of registration for the hostel was also handled by the college. Food from the canteen was provided for hostel students and it was very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A journey through social connection .

content.Placements: Typically, the university provides placement reports detailing the percentage of student scores ranging from 70% to 100%. Companies like Amazon, Microsoft, and TCS are often major recruiters for computer science and engineering courses. More than 30% of students get placed.
content.Infrastructure: The university provides campus-wide Wi-Fi access so that students can connect anywhere they want. Hostel and canteen quality is good, but food recommendations are average. Labs are in good working condition but sometimes the connection to Wi-Fi is poor and you lose internet.

reviews.review_heading: I don't recommend this college for those who are really interested in learning.
reviews.review_text: The college do provide Wi-Fi but of little use to students since phones are not allowed and Wi-Fi access is restricted to labs and secured with password known only to staff. Labs and classroom is okay. Library is good enough for those who refer texts specified in the syllabus it does't support much of literature. Canteen food is a big no for those who wish to stay in the college hostel. But the hostel is maintained well and is the best for sure. I feel like the canteen should be much more neat a...

reviews.review_heading: Fantastic infrastructure, good ambience, well arranged library facility and good teaching method.
reviews.review_text: Wi-fi enabled, large and well-arranged library and separate hostels for girls & boys. There is a special ground for basketball, badminton, volleyball and football. This could be a better option for all the students to find the skill within themselves. And, 2 canteens are working inside the college.

overview_faqs.question: Is Chirala Engineering College a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Chirala Engineering College is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, UG Diploma, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, After 10th Diploma, MCA courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Chirala Engineering College has a rating of 3.68 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. review_summary.college_name: Chirala Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Think before you join any college.

content.Placements: This year, no companies visited for hiring. Only 10 students got placed that to a paid internship and if their work is satisfactory they will be taken as full-time employees. If we get placed package would be 5 LPA. I'm pursuing MCA course at present we didn't get any placement opportunities in our batch.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are very good with a capacity of 150 students and a good infrastructure. We also have labs and library which are also very good. The food is not bad and we also have a canteen. We have sports activities in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, good environment, friendly lecturers and good placements.

content.Placements: In my course, maximum 70% students are placed. The highest package is 7.5 LPA; the average package is 4.5 LPA. TCS, Mahindra, Tata, etc. are the top recruiters. 90% students got internship in Hyderabad from GJ SOLUTIONS INDIA PVT LIMITED company last year in diploma. Total 120 students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: Wifi is available on every floor initially. Library is very good. Classrooms are also flexible. My college has two types of hostels: one is management hostel, which is managed by the college management and second is the welfare hostel, which is managed by the government.

individual_reviews.title: Good college but disappointed with the placement quality.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Chirala Engineering College.

content.Placements: Placements are excellent in this college because every year placement records are maintained at 80 to 90 percent. In recent placements, 93 percent of the students in my course were placed in good companies, software product or service-based companies like Accenture, Cognizant, Wipro, Infosys, DBS Technologies, TCS, Tech Mahindra, Voltech, BP, Mindtree, HP, SAP, Oracle. The college provides training for students for both internships and placements by industry experts and special trainers.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a quite good environment and infrastructure that maintains an aura for students, making them feel interested towards studies. Some of the facilities available and provided by the college management are clean classrooms, labs with a sufficient number of systems, a library with a greater number of books and journals which are helpful for students, pure drinking water, an indoor stadium for games, and a huge ground for sports and other activities.

reviews.review_heading: Good college but disappointed with the placement quality.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good comparatively and the building blocks also look nice to the eye. The quality of the facilities available in the college is good and a wide range of facilities are provided by the college management. Food is also good in the mess and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chirala Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The college has a quite good environment and infrastructure that maintains an aura for students, making them feel interested towards studies. Some of the facilities available and provided by the college management are clean classrooms, labs with a sufficient number of systems, a library with a greater number of books and journals which are helpful for students, pure drinking water, an indoor stadium for games, and a huge ground for sports and other activities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chirala Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very bad, and classes are dirty with dust and paper waste; they clean the classrooms weekly once, until then no one cares about it. They usually ask for money as a penalty for not wearing proper uniform or something else and use that money for upgrading and small repairs. The library is there but filled with couples in free time, so students get distracted easily by seeing them and get out of focus. The only thing that is best about the college is they give more priority to gir...

reviews.review_heading: Affordable and efficient college for diploma aspirants.
reviews.review_text: After completion of the diploma, we need to write some competitive exams to get a seat in a good college and this college is also one of the best colleges for engineering. The college has a peaceful environment that makes the students feel interested in their studies without any deviation or disturbance.

reviews.review_heading: Really a good college with values and ethics.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are quite satisfying in terms of the quality and quantity of the standards that the college is providing. Well-maintained washrooms represent half of the infrastructure maintenance, and the facilities in hostels are average; they have hot water only available at given times, and the taste of food in hostels is only one-time eatable.

reviews.review_heading: Chirala Engineering College is the best for faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure and provides all the facilities required for a student, both academic and personal. In summer, it was much hotter than regular; it is better to fix air conditioning in every class. Cooling water is available during summer so there's no problem with dehydrating ourselves. The quality of facilities in the hostel too good and the food in the canteen was also tasty.

reviews.review_heading: Chirala engineering college review and other information.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are average, and some of the facilities include labs, Wi-Fi, mineral-purified drinking water, library, gym, indoor playroom, dedicated placement cell, digital projector for e-learning, and well-maintained washrooms. The quality of facilities in the college hostel is affordable and comfortable, and the quality of food is also good at both the mess and canteen. Medical facilities are not available but are located nearby. Sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chirala Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The college provides better infrastructure that includes labs with systems and equipment, Wi-Fi, and digital boards for students. The classrooms are clean and neat for academics. The library is also good and pleasant. The hostel provides 24-hour Wi-Fi and water facilities, and the taste of the food is average, not as much as expected. The fee of the hostel is reasonable for the facilities. Overall, the infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chirala Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and buildings are well maintained by the college management. Facilities like the library, well-maintained grounds for sports and games, and social activities like NCC and NSS sub-units for physical fitness and discipline. The quality of food in the canteen was not very good but acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chirala Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: College provides good infrastructure that includes Wi-Fi, labs with equipment, and some basic needs. The classrooms contain digital boards for students. The college has a library with academic and curriculum-related textbooks and some interesting books for students. The hostel also provides 24-hour Wi-Fi and water facilities for students, and the food is about average. And the hostel fee is manageable.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chirala Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The quality of infrastructure and facilities is not good. If any damage occurs to the building due to rains or other issues, they cover it with paint, and that's it; they won't even try to repair it until a major issue happens. The quality of food is very poor in the canteen; they are very commercial and charge more than the actual price. The hostel is also very bad; do not join the hostel. It is better to stay at home than in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chirala Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The college was superb, spread over 36 acres with a huge ground specially designated for sports and games. The college also provides other extracurricular activities like NCC and NSS. The academic blocks are in a rectangular shape, resembling a royal palace, although it's not actually one. I don't know much about the hostel, but the quality of food in the canteen was good.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is a good place to learn.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are good. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. A maximum number of students got an internship at the college. Top roles are not offered to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. It is a good place. Our college provides free Wi-Fi facility. The library is good, and you can find many different books there. Food served to the students is somewhat good. Facilities available in our college are good. There is nothing special about sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: This college was good, but the commitment of students and faculty is poor.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are very good for IT and CSE departments but not for the mechanical and civil departments. The companies that visit the campus offer a low salary package for students. Very few good companies visit the campus to hire students. Placements are not worthful here. The college needs to work on its placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. There are trees on both sides of the path that laid from the entrance to the canteen. Classrooms are very good here. Even the library facilities are good. However, the college provides good Wi-Fi facility for students. They don't even provide any medical facilities. As far as the medical facilities are concerned, they only provide the first aid equipment. Lab facilities provided here are good, and many machines are not even in working condition.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied of sports and really awesome environment and good teaching.

review_content.Placements: 1.75% of students will be placed in each year. 2.10000-25000 are the highest and the lowest amount to be offered. 3. HCL is the one of the best offer of my college. 4.10-50 package to be offered in mechanical engineering 5.60%, Honda, tvs and leyland.
review_content.Infrastructure: In my college, good coaches and teachers are there for all students and they also teach the manner of life. Digital library are available in our college. Good environment and highly technical lab also here. CNC machine also here for mechanical students. In our college have good infrastructure. Hostel, canteen good food also here.

faqs.question: Q: Which courses does Ganadipathy Tulsi's Jain Engineering College offer to students?

faqs.answer: Ganadipathy Tulsi's Jain Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

overview_faqs.question: Is Ganadipathy Tulsi's Jain Engineering College a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Ganadipathy Tulsi's Jain Engineering College is a well-known institution for B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Ganadipathy Tulsi's Jain Engineering College has a rating of 3.3 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.3 on campuslife, 2.6 on placements, 3.4 on faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Ganadipathy Tulsi's Jain Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good but it is situated in rural area.

content.Placements: Our college is average but our department students get placed mostly. around 77% of students got placed. The highest salary package was 12 LPA and the lowest salary package was 1.8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HCL and Accenture.
content.Infrastructure: We have a very good lab facility with a good Wi-Fi connection. Classrooms are good and have a very good library facility. Canteen should be improved. Sports and games are average.
content.Faculty: Teachers are good, well talented, and well qualified. Their way of teaching is excellent. We get lots of knowledge from them. The course teaches the students based on the work they are going to work in industries. Semester exams are a little difficult. The pass percentage is 80%.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied because of placements training and support for 2016.

content.Placements: There were no placements training and no placements opportunity. They asked to join with VIT consortium for placements. In competition there were like 100 vacancies and there were 3000 candidates without proper guidance and most of cannot make it. There were not much in placements cell.
content.Infrastructure: This college provides a library and a digital library. Wi-Fi was there but of no use for students. The passwords were not available. Laboratories were like the same with old equipment it was running. The hostel was there for both boys and girls. It provides a cafeteria for snacks and lunch. Sports events were held very rare. Medical facility was available, one doctor was available in this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college is a good place to learn.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. A maximum number of students got an internship at the college. Top roles are not offered to the students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. It is a good place. Our college provides free Wi-Fi facility. The library is good, and you can find many different books there. Food served to the students is somewhat good. Facilities available in our college are good. There is nothing special about sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: This college was good, but the commitment of students and faculty is poor.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are very good for IT and CSE departments but not for the mechanical and civil departments. The companies that visit the campus offer a low salary package for students. Very few good companies visit the campus to hire students. Placements are not worthful here. The college needs to work on its placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. There are trees on both sides of the path that laid from the entrance to the canteen. Classrooms are very good here. Even the library facilities are good. However, the college provides good Wi-Fi facility for students. They don't even provide any medical facilities. As far as the medical facilities are concerned, they only provide the first aid equipment. Lab facilities provided here are good, and many machines are not even in working condition.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied of sports and really awesome environment and good teaching.

content.Placements: 1.75% of students will be placed in each year. 2.10000-25000 are the highest and the lowest amount to be offered. 3. HCL is the one of the best offer of my college. 4.10-50 package to be offered in mechanical engineering 5.60%, Honda, tvs and leyland.
content.Infrastructure: In my college, good coaches and teachers are there for all students and they also teach the manner of life. Digital library are available in our college. Good environment and highly technical lab also here. CNC machine also here for mechanical students. In our college have good infrastructure. Hostel, canteen good food also here.

faqs.question: How can I get into Ganadipathy Tulsi's Jain Engineering College for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Ganadipathy Tulsi's Jain Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also e

faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Ganadipathy Tulsi's Jain Engineering College is up to 504. Good thing to know is that Ganadipathy Tulsi's Jain Engineering College has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

admission_process.title: Scient Institute of Technology (SIT, Ibrahimpatnam) Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Scient Institute of Technology (SIT, Ibrahimpatnam) admission 2025is currently open. The institute offers BTech, MTech and MBA courses at the UG and PG level. The institute also offers Lateral Entry courses. The institute is affiliated withJawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad. To be admitted to the Scient Institute of Technology, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The institute offers courses in Engineering and Management streams. The application process at Scient Institute of Technology (SIT, Ibrahimpatnam) is conducted offline. Read the following article to know more aboutScient Institute of Technology course admission2025.

The mode of study at Scient Institute of Technology courses is full-time. To enrol for various course admissions, candidates must complete the last educational qualification set by the institute. Read on to know more aboutScient Institute of Technology (SIT, Ibrahimpatnam)course admissions2025.

Scient Institute of Technology (SIT, Ibrahimpatnam) courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must also fulfill the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria forScient Institute of Technology (SIT, Ibrahimpatnam) courses:

Scient Institute of Technology admission process includes registration and marks obtained in the entrance exam as per respective courses. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in Scient Institute of Technology (SIT, Ibrahimpatnam):
STEP 1: Scient Institute of Technology Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply offline. To download the application form, candidates need to visit the official website.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Students will be selected based on entrance exam scores as per respective courses. For BTech and MBA courses, candidates must have a valid score of EAPCET/ICET, respectively. However, for the MTech course admission, candidates must have a valid GATE/PG-ECET score.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

cut_off.college_name: Scient Institute of Technology Cutoff 2025: Check TS ICET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Scient Institute of Technology (SIT, Ibrahimpatnam) cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Scient Institute of Technology (SIT, Ibrahimpatnam) TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 44245 and 79145 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning and B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 44245, 67734 and 68117, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Scient Institute of Technology (SIT, Ibrahimpatnam). Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Scient Institute of Technology (SIT, Ibrahimpatnam) MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 19843. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 26308, and the 2023 cutoff was 23565 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college at a low price. This college is number 1 in the lowest-priced colleges.
reviews.review_text: There was no hostel facility, but the college infrastructure was beautiful. Outside the college, the environment was so greenery. A canteen was there in college. Labs and classrooms were very beautiful and green boards with white chalk pieces. Moreover, the labs and toilets were very good.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the study in my college.
reviews.review_text: First of all, infrastructure was very good in my college with more trees and plants and it was very green and peaceful. Our college didn't have a hostel everybody used to live in private hostels, paying guests, or regular people. Food was quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of its placements.
reviews.review_text: In my college, there are many types of labs and classrooms. There is Wi-Fi facility. We also have a good library to study and labs are normal in my college. Canteen also good at food service and sports. In canteen, all needs are available.

reviews.review_heading: As of now, our college has the best faculty members and good placements for students.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure and a pleasant environment around the campus. We have the best Wi-Fi facilities and various books in libraries. Hostel facilities are not available on campus but we have private hostels nearby our campus. They conduct sports every weekend and select students for further games.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good according to the College and Department Services.
reviews.review_text: The good facilities and infrastructures are available for our course and we are spacious classrooms with digital classrooms and our departments consists of good library with lot of books. Our College consists good quality food and the medical facilities also available and our department encourages us towards sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with the college because of its facilities, environment, etc.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are 2 km away from this college. There are government hostels and private hostels. The hostel fee is Rs.5,000. The government hostel facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilites and the infrastructure of our college are the best. It has spacious classrooms with digital boards and labs with the latest equipment. Our college has a big library with a wide variety of books and free Wi-Fi is provided to students on campus. The hostel is of good quality. There are spacious rooms with air-conditioners, study chairs, and a refrigerator. The quality of food served in the hostel is very good and hygienic. Mess is very clean and neat. reviews.review_heading: My college is excellent.
reviews.review_text: We have high standard of infrastructure with eco-friendly culture. The college provides drinking water and maintains the restrooms very cleanly. It has a very good canteen. In canteen, they provide healthy food. The college also maintains a ground surrounded with the tress which gives eco-friendly feeling.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
My college has wi-fi, but only in the labs. We have a very peaceful library in which we are free to study, and our classrooms are also very peaceful, and we are having a great time.
We have a canteen, sports, and games that we enjoy a lot, but there isn't enough time to play.

The OJEE 2026 registration process has begun for Spintronic Technology and Advance Research admission to BTech, BPharma, MBA, and MCA programmes. The final date to register is Mar 22, 2026. Additionally, the exam dates are tentatively scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, and from May 7 to May 9, 2026.

faqs.answer: A:    Spintronic Technology and Advance Research is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, After 10th Diploma courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialization at Spintronic Technology and Advance Research are Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electronics Engineering.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: More than 50% of students got placements through the college campus. The average package is 3.6 LPA. Almost all students got internships from various companies like NALCO, Tata, etc. Courses like mechanical, electrical, civil, and computer Science engineering are available here.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good in the college. Lab facility is also available. Wi-Fi is there for students to access the internet. The food available in the canteen is satisfactory. Sports facilities are available on the college premises for students to improve their skills.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: The college is good but low placements facility.

content.Placements: Around 10% of the students got placed. The highest salary offered was Rs. 35,000 per month. The lowest salary offered was Rs. 15,000 per month. The average salary offered was Rs. 20,000. Companies like Tata Consultancy Service, Harish Group of Industries, Chetak Auto Parts Company Ltd, etc., visited our campus for placements. The highest salary package offered was 4.2 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 1.8 LPA. The average salary package offered was 2.4 LPA. Almost 40% of the students got an internship in companies like Arti Steel, Force Motors, Capco Industries Ltd.

admission_process.title: Spintronic Technology and Advance Research Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Spintronic Technology and Advance Research admissions are entrance-based. Candidates must appear for certain entrance exams to take admission. reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good in the college. Lab facility is also available. Wi-Fi is there for students to access the internet. The food available in the canteen is satisfactory. Sports facilities are available on the college premises for students to improve their skills.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good but low placements facility.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and libraries are well-maintained. There is a Wi-Fi facility. The canteen is also available here. There is a transportation facility. Hostels are available for both boys and girls. The food facilities are very good in college as well as in hostels. There are also outdoor and indoor stadium available for sports and games.

It’s a wonderful college for students. It has a scenic campus and it’s surrounded by a set of mountains. Although all lecturers are not good but a majority number of lecturers are excellent. It has a beautiful garden and designed gate to enter it and also it has a fantastic water fountain. Above all although having some shortcomings it’s a reliable institution. First aid medical facilities are available, and very limited sports and games are conducted here.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding RCP Universe Group of Institutions Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The fee structure for the RCP Universe Group of Institutions programmes is around INR 90,000 to 3,28,000.

faqs.answer: A:    RCP Universe Group of Institutions provides programmes including B.Ed, M.Sc, UG Diploma, After 10th Diploma, B.Sc, B.J.M.C, B.Com in streams such as Teaching & Education, Science, Engineering, Animation, Design, Mass Communication & Media, Accounting & Commerce, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Chemistry, Agriculture, Biotechnology, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Construction Engineering, Production Engineering, Microbiology, Computer Science, Fashion Design, Physics.
faqs.question: Which courses does RCP Universe Group of Institutions offer?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good faculty, hostel and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Around 90% of students are placed. The highest salary package is 8 to 9 LPA and the least salary package was 4 to 3 LPA. Top companies are Sun Pharma and Cipla. A pharmacist role is offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and a good canteen with good food. Wi-Fi, RO, playground, good warden, and clean rooms are provided in the hostel with good infrastructure. Mess and canteen are the best. Hostel and college contain good medical facilities and medical van. Hostel contains volleyball pitch, cricket pitch, and football pitch.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It's a good college in Roorkee and placements are good.

review_content.Placements: About 40% of the students were placed in very good companies and the lowest salary offered is Rs 15000/- per month and the highest salary is Rs 50000/- per month. The top companies are SUN Pharma and Jubilant Pharma. Almost 100% of the students got an internship from Medical hospital and a training letter provided by the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel quality is very good and also provides medical facilities. Infrastructure is available for every course. Wi-Fi facility is provided to students. The labs are so clean and all instruments and apparatus are available in the lab. All chemicals and apparatus are available.

overview_faqs.question: Can RCP Universe Group of Institutions be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: RCP Universe Group of Institutions is a renowned institution offering B.Ed, M.Sc, UG Diploma, After 10th Diploma, B.Sc, B.J.M.C, B.Com. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Teaching & Education, Science, Engineering, Animation, Design, Mass Communication & Media, Accounting & Commerce. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. RCP Universe Group of Institutions boasts an impressive review rating of 3.3 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.5 for Campus Life, 3.5 for Placements, 4 for Faculty, and 3.5 for Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the RCP Universe Group of Institutions?
overview_faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the RCP Universe Group of Institutions is around INR 105000.

review_summary.college_name: RCP Universe Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: College is the Worst—Avoid at All Costs.

content.Placements: None of my colleagues were placed because no companies were invited by the management. They don't even know the industry rules. Here, you can only come and go; not a single teacher will help you in your studies because they themselves don't know—they just passed out and started teaching.
content.Infrastructure: The library was okay, but there’s no Wi-Fi. Labs are too bad, and the instruments don’t work. For sports, they have a three-day fest where you have to bring the equipment; even those are rarely operated by the teachers. Once, I asked a teacher about HPLC, which is a very common instrument in pharma, but she didn't even know what it was, so you can see how the college is.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: RCP universe-Golden opportunities for education.

content.Placements: There are many companies that reach out to our college for placement. Cipla Comwas arrived at our college for placement and selected 10 students for the company at the production officer post. Mankind also comes to my college and selects five students every year for mankind. And many more companies reach out to the college too.
content.Infrastructure: It is a very beautiful piece of infrastructure for our college. A very nice mess and well-maintained hostel is there. In our hostel, a very beautiful bed a a nice bedroom is there, along with well maintained furniture. In the mess, the college provides tasty and healthy food.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good faculty, hostel and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students are placed. The highest salary package is 8 to 9 LPA and the least salary package was 4 to 3 LPA. Top companies are Sun Pharma and Cipla. A pharmacist role is offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and a good canteen with good food. Wi-Fi, RO, playground, good warden, and clean rooms are provided in the hostel with good infrastructure. Mess and canteen are the best. Hostel and college contain good medical facilities and medical van. Hostel contains volleyball pitch, cricket pitch, and football pitch.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It's a good college in Roorkee and placements are good.

content.Placements: About 40% of the students were placed in very good companies and the lowest salary offered is Rs 15000/- per month and the highest salary is Rs 50000/- per month. The top companies are SUN Pharma and Jubilant Pharma. Almost 100% of the students got an internship from Medical hospital and a training letter provided by the college.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel quality is very good and also provides medical facilities. Infrastructure is available for every course. Wi-Fi facility is provided to students. The labs are so clean and all instruments and apparatus are available in the lab. All chemicals and apparatus are available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Facilities in our college are good, but if you want to gain knowledge, then don't join here.

content.Placements: Only 30%-35% of the students got placed after completing their course. Akums was the only company which hired many students from our college, and it offered the highest salary package of 3 LPA. The other company Selaqui also offered the same salary package of 3 LPA, but students opt for Akums company. The average salary package offered was 2.4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The basic infrastructure of our college is awesome. For students, there are clean and hygienic washrooms, water-cooler and air-conditioned classrooms and labs. There is also a canteen where you can get good quality meals at affordable prices. Every year our college celebrates a sports meet, and it is really good.

admission_process.title: RCP Universe Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: RCP Universe Group of Institutions admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.RCP Universe Group of Institutionsoffers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels. Some of the courses include B.J.M.C., B.Ed, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 90,000 - 3,28,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.
