reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Classrooms and computer labs Wi-Fi enabled. There are about 1,000 books in the library by which a person can learn many things. The college does not provide hostel facility, and one can stay outside in PGs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2016Offered by Institute of Technology Roorkee, RCP Universe Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 10 Apr 2019)
reviews.review_heading: College is fairly good with its infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: All the necessary facilities are available where students can implement their theoretical knowledge into practice. Classrooms are spacious. Traditional food is served. Hostel rooms are equipped with all the basic amenities expected. Canteen is also available in the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2016Offered by Institute of Technology Roorkee, RCP Universe Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 22 Sep 2015)
reviews.review_text: IIT Roorkee has one of the finest civil engineering course offerings in India. Apart from learning from the most renowned faculty, the campus also has top class sport facilities available, it has its own adventure club, popularly known as HEC (Himalayan explorer club) and other recreational facilities too. Though a bit orthodox administration, but now a days it is improving as the time goes by. IIT Roorkee has one of the finest civil engineering course offerings in India. Apart from learning from the most renowned faculty, the campus also has top class sport facilities available, it has its own adventure club, popularly known as HEC (Himalayan explorer club) and other recreational facilities too. Though a bit orthodox administration, but now a days it is improving as the time goes by.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Roorkee College of Pharmacy, RCP Universe Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 23 Jan 2023)
reviews.review_heading: The college are not bad.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi, okay to library but no equipment in library. The hostel are not cleaned proplery, mess food are not available in this college. The canteen is our hostel and college not provide all materials as like samosa and not like to paneer and the food quality is good not bad.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good location. The fee is high. Faculty members support their students.
reviews.review_text:
One library is available. We have found our 50% books but not 100%. There is a church in the college. There are no study materials. 
Other course students do not have any facilities and faculty members. There are no labs for practicals. There is no fixed time to open and close the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Roorkee College of Management & Computer Applications, RCP Universe Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 2 May 2020)
reviews.review_heading: Our college provides the best faculty members and facilities for study.
reviews.review_text: I am a day scholar, but my friends staying at the hostel told that it serves the best food in the mess. They also provide the best facilities for students which are always helpful for us in the study. In the library, we get books related to our course as well as other materials to increase our knowledge.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Institute of Technology Roorkee, RCP Universe Group of InstitutionsReviewed on 5 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: WIT is a campus institute of UTU.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel has very small rooms where 2–3 students stay. There is no availability of ACs in summer or geysers in winter. Everything is very costly, and you have to pay for every small thing you can imagine, such as Wi-Fi facility or laundry in the hostel.

overview_faqs.question: Is Srinix College of Engineering a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Srinix College of Engineering is a reputed institute for B.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Srinix College of Engineering has a review rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.9 on campuslife, 4.1 on placements, 4.3 on faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Srinix College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This college is good and teachers also. You can take admission there for your better future.

content.Placements: Tata Advance System, Tata, Jindal Plant. Accenture, Lumax Industries Limited, Motherson Automation Solutions, Honda Motorcycle, Scooty India at India Automobile Limited, and TM Automotive had limited seats in this college. All staffs and lecturers were good, and provided the best way for our growth at this college.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were good. Hostel was also good. The practical classes were good to gain in machinery knowledge like CNC, and all mechanical tools were available in the college premises VMC equipment. Hostel food and hostel warden were very good. My colleagues were very good. College was very good in my district. To my knowledge, many colleges were there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best colleges.

content.Placements: In our branch, most of the students got internships in 3rd and 4th years. The highest salary package offered is 16 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges between 3 LPA - 4 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tata and Tech Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all the necessary equipment and facilities like Wi-Fi, a library, modern labs, classrooms, and a hostel. The hostel rooms are well-cleaned. Around four students can stay in each room. Our college has a canteen. Our canteen provides breakfast and lunch. Students can play all sports in our college.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Srinix College of Engineering.

content.Faculty: In our college, all teachers are qualified. Many teachers are PG and PhD holders. They have good knowledge, and they give solutions properly. The course curriculum is relevant, and it makes the students industry-ready.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Overall, our college is of average type with average faculty, facilities and placements.

content.Placements: From our college, about 80% of students got placed from our course. It depends on placement companies and our college authority. Not very good companies visit here to give a good salary. About 80% of students or above got internships, and Hi-Tech Mahindra and Ori-Plast offered internships. Roles offered are not much good.
content.Infrastructure: There were very poor facilities and infrastructure here. There were many departments, but only one lab was available, and even it was not in good condition. There were many classrooms, but they were not good or not comfortable. There were very poor quality facilities in our hostel. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college offers courses at low fee charges, best infrastructure, good teachers, and placements.

content.Placements: Around 30% of the students in our college got placed in the CSE branch. Top recruiting companies of our college are Tech Mahindra, Tata Consultant, Reliance, Ultratech, Dalmia, etc. Around 70% of the students got internships in CTTC, BBSR, DRDO Chndipur Balasore Odisha. Our college offers practical experience and a very strict study process. Around 70% of the passing our batch get selected in campus selection. Many companies visit the campus for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: All types of facilities available in our college. We have CCTV cameras installed, classrooms, cheap price canteen meal, air-conditioned labs, and hall. The entire campus is Wi-FI enabled. The hostel is very clean and strict guidelines are to be followed. Mobile phones are not allowed during study time. Every day, at 5 pm all types of games are played by students. Medical officer is available in our hostel and campus 24X7. The department of computer science and engineering was introduced in the year 2009. It is equipped with sophisticated laboratories and well-qualified faculty members who are not only technically skilled but also professionally competent. Students have 12-hour guide access to the internet lab and are given a free hand in using the services of printers and scanners.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: About 40% to 50% of students are placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, and the average is 3.6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Deloitte, Wipro, and ITC. Roles offered are project manager, product manager, marketing manager, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available. Classrooms are quite good. Labs are available. A library is available. All kinds of books for studying are available. There is no hostel. The canteen food is quite tasty. Good medical facilities are available. A sports week is conducted.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Vidhyapeeth Institute of Science & Technology.

review_content.Placements: None of the companies has visited the campus during my final year for placements. VIST does not even invite companies for internships. The last placements were conducted in 2016, and then our college management stopped inviting any company to the campus. It just helps you in signing documents if you find an internship on your own. I also did an internship like that.
review_content.Infrastructure: VIST does have a huge campus and lots of space. There were separate labs according to branches. VIST has one library where you can only get books related to our college courses. There is no public Wi-Fi for students, and they provide internet only for staff members. VIST doesn't have any hostel on the campus, but it helps students to find one hostel, which is good. There is one sports ground and one nice garden to relax.

review_summary.college_name: Vidhyapeeth Institute of Science & Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It's amazing and quite good in terms of placements as according to fees.

content.Placements: The average percentage of students who got placed is 80%. The highest package is not in my knowledge, but the average package is 5.5 LPA to 6 LPA, and the median package is 3 LPA, and some other. Above 60% of students got internships. Roles offered are analyzing, testing, etc. Recruiting companies are Infosys, Tata, Suzuki, and Maruti.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has Wi-Fi, modern labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms, average mess food, canteen snacks, basic medical support, and good sports facilities for cricket, football, and indoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Vidhyapeeth Institute of Science & Technology.

content.Placements: There is not a good placement cell in college. But some companies approached the college, and their salary is almost 2 LPA or 2.5 LPA. So overall, there is not good placement here. But the teachers and placement coordinators are very cooperative. They guide you very well to get companies off-campus.
content.Infrastructure: There is not any hostel and mess facility in college, and the college canteen is below average. The medical facility in college is good. There are not many sports facilities provided by the institute, but they provide some sports tournaments. The college provides all the facilities like Wi-Fi campus, a good library, and all necessary labs with working systems.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: About 40% to 50% of students are placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA, and the average is 3.6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Deloitte, Wipro, and ITC. Roles offered are project manager, product manager, marketing manager, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available. Classrooms are quite good. Labs are available. A library is available. All kinds of books for studying are available. There is no hostel. The canteen food is quite tasty. Good medical facilities are available. A sports week is conducted.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Vidhyapeeth Institute of Science & Technology.

content.Placements: None of the companies has visited the campus during my final year for placements. VIST does not even invite companies for internships. The last placements were conducted in 2016, and then our college management stopped inviting any company to the campus. It just helps you in signing documents if you find an internship on your own. I also did an internship like that.
content.Infrastructure: VIST does have a huge campus and lots of space. There were separate labs according to branches. VIST has one library where you can only get books related to our college courses. There is no public Wi-Fi for students, and they provide internet only for staff members. VIST doesn't have any hostel on the campus, but it helps students to find one hostel, which is good. There is one sports ground and one nice garden to relax.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: It is the worse college of Bhopal.

content.Placements: There are no placements in our college, and if some companies visit here, then they are of no use. Placement department doesn't do any work, and they don't have any link with any company. Neither the college administration helps in placements. The maximum salary package offered is about 1 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college doesn't have any hostel, but they provide a private hostel which is far away from college. The hostel area has no connection with accommodation. Food quality is worse. There is no Wi-Fi facility. The library is good but lacks books collection. Labs are outdated.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

highlights.summary:
The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Sai Ganapathi Engineering College admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer:
A:    Sai Ganapathi Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream of engineering and technology with the above-mentioned minimum percentage (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Preference will be given to candidates qualified GATE in the relevant branch based on their test scores and the remaining seats will be for candidates qualified in APPGECET as per their merit ranksB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placements, good faculty.

review_content.Placements: My course is B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering. Maximum percentage of students was placed in our course. The highest package offered in my course is Rs. 20,000. Average package offered in my course is Rs. 15,000. The lowest package offered in my course is Rs. 11,000.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course are very high. There are 3 labs for my course. Classroom infrastructure is also good. ECE course (i.e, my course)has so many books available. The quality of food available in the mess is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is an overall average campus. I do not likely recommend other students to join it.

review_content.Placements: A very small percentage of students get placed, and many students do not get placements. The package offered is very low. The highest package is 5 LPA and the minimum package is 2 LPA. The top recruiting companies of our college are Tata, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, etc. I think 85 to 80% of students got internships from our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has labs, classrooms, and a library. There is no Wi-Fi. It also has a hostel but with basic facilities. The food is good anyway. The hostel facility is basic. It has simple rooms for multiple people. The library is also small. Labs are fine, and also classrooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Truth behind the college .

review_content.Placements: In our college, placements are based on skills and semester percentages. In semester exams, the percentage must be more than 85%. The highest package is 10 lacs per annum. Companies like Amazon and Tech Mahindra are the major recruiters.
review_content.Infrastructure: The faculty explains everything to students. Labs are available, and Wi-Fi is provided. The library has many books related to the subjects. Hostel food is hygienic, with morning tiffins like idli, puri, dosa, and upma. Lunch and dinner are meals. On special occasions, they serve biryani and chicken.

Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply. There is no age restriction.

rows: M.E./M.Tech

Candidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.

Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects.
Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject.
Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply.
There is no age restriction.

review_summary.college_name: Sai Ganapathi Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The days of my graduation.

content.Placements: 90% of students from our course have been placed in topmost companies like Hitachi, Nipun, TCS, Tech Mahindra, Kyb Motors Ltd, and many more. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest is 2.5 LPA, and the average package is 4.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: We have very good infrastructure in our course and hostel. The hostel is only for boys. Girls should check for PGs near the college. We have a library and Wi-Fi facilities in the labs. The mess and canteen are good. We have 2 canteens for students and faculty with good quality and quantity of food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A Deep Dive into Sai Ganapathi's Engineering Programme.

content.Placements: Students also praise colleges. That offer good placement support. It has a strong community with friendly peers and seniors.
content.Infrastructure: Well-maintained classrooms, hygienic canteens, and well-equipped libraries and computer labs with reliable Wi-Fi access. Access to facilities like transportation, hygienic food in canteens, and accessible administrative staff. There are labs in every semester. The lab facility is very good. There are plenty of machines. Good infrastructure with well maintained facilities like libraries and labs. Opportunities for extracurricular activities and provides a positive, growth-oriented environment for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placements, good faculty.

content.Placements: My course is B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering. Maximum percentage of students was placed in our course. The highest package offered in my course is Rs. 20,000. Average package offered in my course is Rs. 15,000. The lowest package offered in my course is Rs. 11,000.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course are very high. There are 3 labs for my course. Classroom infrastructure is also good. ECE course (i.e, my course)has so many books available. The quality of food available in the mess is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is an overall average campus. I do not likely recommend other students to join it.

content.Placements: A very small percentage of students get placed, and many students do not get placements. The package offered is very low. The highest package is 5 LPA and the minimum package is 2 LPA. The top recruiting companies of our college are Tata, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, etc. I think 85 to 80% of students got internships from our course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has labs, classrooms, and a library. There is no Wi-Fi. It also has a hostel but with basic facilities. The food is good anyway. The hostel facility is basic. It has simple rooms for multiple people. The library is also small. Labs are fine, and also classrooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Truth behind the college .

content.Placements: In our college, placements are based on skills and semester percentages. In semester exams, the percentage must be more than 85%. The highest package is 10 lacs per annum. Companies like Amazon and Tech Mahindra are the major recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: The faculty explains everything to students. Labs are available, and Wi-Fi is provided. The library has many books related to the subjects. Hostel food is hygienic, with morning tiffins like idli, puri, dosa, and upma. Lunch and dinner are meals. On special occasions, they serve biryani and chicken.

reviews.review_heading: Our college environment is good.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is pretty good, and there are excellent facilities in our college. Facilities for our course are provided by college management, including good classrooms, a very good library, and the best laboratories. There is a college hostel facility for the students. The quality of food in the college hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sai Ganapathi Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good. Useful books are provided in the library. The quality of the hostel is okay for staying and eating. The washrooms are well-maintained. Medical and sports facilities are available in the college, such as a basketball court, badminton, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: More facilities are provided with education.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available at our college are nice labs with Wi-Fi facilities and the class rooms are large and designed in a modern way. WiFi connections and resources like Record and Blue Books are there. The hostel is comfortable and safe, and it is near a college. Good food is in the canteen and mess is available.

reviews.review_heading: This college is mainly for middle class family.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good. Food, hostel and canteen are there in which food is better compared to other colleges. It has a good hostel for its quality for very less price. Sports wise, the college is average and library is there but it does not have many books in it.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the facilities provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: There are good mechanical labs. This college encourages sports and social activities. There is a sum quota for admissions, and sports reservations are available. It has good value for money. They are conducting motivation classes, and yearly college fest celebrations are held. We play cricket, volleyball and indoor games. I would recommend joining this college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. It has labs, classrooms, and a library with a good collection of books. I am not a hostel student, so I don't know much about the hostel. But it is a good canteen in our college. Of course, that is the main attracting point for freshers. The maintenance of our canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good because of faculty, good placements in 2018,2019 and 2020.
reviews.review_text: Capacities and infrastructure availability for my course electrical and electronics engineering is not too good and not too bad, Wi-Fi is not available in my campus labs, classrooms, library are available for my course or department. The quality of food in my hostel is good but not good as canteen in college, quality of hostel like bests bedsheet, water facility are good, sports and games are well played in my college and supportive staff.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, well-educated teachers and a transport facility.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good classrooms. There is ample space for students in each classroom. The infrastructure is excellent. The environment on the campus is peaceful for learning.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for the financially best students.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms here are neat, clean and very comfortable in terms of sitting arrangements. All laboratories are available in our college related to our course. All books are available in our college library related to our course. There is no Wi-Fi facility on our campus. The hostel rooms are average. The food served in the canteen is good, but prices are a little bit higher than MRP prices. Weekly once sports period is available in regular timetable.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for the middle-class people, but the placements are very bad.
reviews.review_text: We have free hostel facilities for engineering students. We have to pay 2,000 per month for the canteen food. We have no Wi-Fi. Labs are extremely good, and we have all the equipment we need. Canteen food is average. We have 2 canteens on campus.

faqs.question: How can I get into College of Food Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
College of Food Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidates having Bachelor's degree with 3 years duration will not be considered for admission through ICAR AIEEA (PG)-2023 in AU under ICAR-AU system except in few 
courses at two ICAR-Deemed to be Universities (DUs), viz. IARI and NDRI for which the eligibility criteria of the concerned ICAR-DU, including admission of graduates having passed with 3 years' degree are eligible for admission.
Candidate should not below 19 years of age as on 31.08.2023.

faqs.question: What is the overall intake at College of Food Technology for all courses together?
faqs.answer: Combined intake across all courses at College of Food Technology is up to 15. College of Food Technology offers Degree courses including 1 PG courses. Additionally, it also has Doctorate courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode.
